flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Marquette University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.8k → $51.2k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Marquette University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($45.8k → $51.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Marquette University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.5% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Marquette University are 41% above the private nonprofit bachelor's-predominant peer median ($78.3k vs $55.7k).
